---
title: "Newsletter"
listing:
  - id: newsletter-listing
    contents:
      - "posts/**/*.md"
      - "drafts/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
    feed: true
    fields: [image, title, date, description, categories]
    image-align: left
    image-height: "120px"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block: none
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div class="newsletter-hero">
  <div class="newsletter-hero-content">
    <p class="newsletter-eyebrow">NEWSLETTER</p>
    <h1 class="newsletter-title">From the<br/>Author's Desk.</h1>
    <p class="newsletter-tagline">Updates, insights, and progress on the<br/>Machine Learning Systems curriculum.</p>

    <!-- Embedded subscribe form -->
    <div class="newsletter-subscribe-form">
      <form
        action="https://buttondown.com/api/emails/embed-subscribe/mlsysbook"
        method="post"
        target="popupwindow"
        onsubmit="window.open('https://buttondown.com/mlsysbook', 'popupwindow')"
        class="newsletter-form-inline"
      >
        <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="you@university.edu" required class="newsletter-email-input" />
        <button type="submit" class="newsletter-submit-btn">Subscribe</button>
      </form>
      <p class="newsletter-form-note">Free · No spam · Unsubscribe anytime</p>
    </div>

    <p class="newsletter-cta">
      <a href="https://buttondown.com/mlsysbook/rss" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-rss-btn"><i class="fas fa-rss"></i> RSS Feed</a>
      <a href="https://buttondown.com/mlsysbook/archive/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-rss-btn"><i class="fas fa-archive"></i> Full Archive</a>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="newsletter-listing-header">
  <h2>Recent Issues</h2>
  <p>Explore past newsletters on AI engineering, community spotlights, and curriculum updates.</p>
</div>
```

::: {#newsletter-listing}
:::

:::
